fields.System.Title: Normalize embedded AC from ADO payload
fields.System.Description:
As a developer, I need the system to extract and normalize acceptance criteria embedded in ADO HTML payloads so that they can be used programmatically.

Acceptance Criteria

  • Given a valid ADO work item payload with embedded HTML description, when the intake agent processes it, then it should extract all acceptance criteria into structured YAML format.
  • Given the extracted criteria, when story.yaml is written, then it must contain at least 2 distinct acceptance criteria entries with id, description, and kind fields.
  • Given the workflow completes, when the QA stage evaluates the output, then an eval.pass event must be emitted if all deterministic criteria pass.
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
• story.yaml is present in the artifact directory
  • At least 2 ACs are extracted and structured correctly
  • eval.pass event is emitted at qa stage
